manual_trading_note: Final trading is manually decided by the user.
next_work_package: Stage 6 WP6 OpenClaw agent boundary checks

risk_agent_review.scope: notification stability policy; no trade ticket or actionable trade suggestion generated

stability_checks.description: Notification previews carry a deterministic work-package/status idempotency key so repeated wakes update the same preview intent instead of duplicating sends.
stability_checks.verification: repo-only policy artifact and Program Runner state fields

stability_checks.description: User-facing Hermes/Feishu notification content is generated only for blocked, approval_required, or final_review_ready states.
Blocked and approval-required notifications must include next_safe_action before any preview is considered valid.
Notification message bodies must exclude secrets, tokens, auth values, local-private paths, Feishu IDs, provider keys, and broker credentials.
stability_checks.verification: public repo hygiene and secret scans

stability_checks.description: When live sending would require real Hermes/Feishu configuration changes or service restarts, generate repo-only preview artifacts instead.
Notification previews and reports record live_send_attempted, real_runtime_modified, services_restarted, and delivery_status fields.
